rationale: The citing paper references Dukes, Gal-Or, and Srinivasan (2006) only as an example that channel models for physical consumer goods are already well studied. The citation appears in a grouped, background-style parenthetical in the conclusion, mainly to contrast the authors' media-content setting with traditional goods-channel settings. The paper does not use this cited work's bargaining model, results, or methods in its own formal setup, propositions, or derivations.
